title: Praise to the Lord! I Will Extol Him

verses.text: Glorious and mighty are his actions, His justice is forevermore. He made his wondrous works remembered, Most kind and gracious in the Lord.
He sent redemption for his people, His covenant he did ordain That it should stand secure forever; Revered and holy is his name.
Fear of the Lord gives rise to wisdom For all who walk in upright ways; All who obey have understanding. To him belongs eternal praise!
